# PinTop
> Always-on-top for any macOS window — live overlay, not just video PiP.

- Buy: https://shivalam.gumroad.com/l/pintop ($9.99 one-time)
- Site: https://soda3808.github.io/pintop-website/
- Trial: 7 days in-app after install (full features, no account)
- Refund: 30 days
- Platform: macOS 14+ (Apple Silicon + Intel)
- Shortcut: Ctrl+Option+P pin/unpin
- Privacy: no analytics; one optional Gumroad license check on activate
